description: This email template is a crucial tool for Human Resources professionals to express gratitude to candidates post-application. Using the perfect blend of professional language and warm sentiment, it facilitates smooth onboarding and sourcing of talent. The template is designed to acknowledge the time and effort applicants put into applying for jobs and attending interviews. The dark mode feature ensures easy readability and minimal eye strain for HR personnel. As part of the 'Thank You' category, this template helps companies leave a positive impression on potential employees, fostering a respectful and appreciative relationship from the outset. This template is an excellent resource for promoting a company's image while managing its talent acquisition needs.
short_description: This Human Resources email template is a vital tool for expressing gratitude to job applicants. Designed for easy readability in dark mode, it acknowledges the applicant's time and effort, fostering an appreciative relationship. Perfect for onboarding and sourcing talent, it promotes a positive company image. A must-have for HR professionals.

designer.description: I am a graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and photography. Currently working freelance and open for new work!

Log In

 

THANK YOU

We received your application!

We will keep you posted on next steps! In the meantime, here are a few things you should know.

 
 

What you can expect working at Brand.

Learn More
 

What Next?

After our interviewing period we will evaluate all applicants. This might get time, and we might not be able to get in touch in you're not selected. Here's our deadlines and when you can expect to hear back from us:

June 2nd | Deadline for applications

June 18th | Evaluation period

July 6th | Contacting our selected applicants

 
 

Have any questions? Contact us!

 
 

Stay up-to-date with current activities and future events by following us on your favorite social media channels.

Changed your mind? Unsubscribe
